  "society_power": 4.2,
  "state_power": 7.5,
  "society_change": 0.7,
  "state_change": 0.5,
  "key_event": "Economic reforms, Tiananmen Square crackdown",
  "reasoning": "Economic reforms and urbanization bolstered state power and civil society, but the 1989 crackdown significantly weakened civil society's capacity to mobilize."
